div1.entryFree:
Gout, 1) the arthritis: Meas. III, 1, 31. As III, 2, 338. H4B I, 2, 258. H4B I, 2, 258 Cymb. V, 4, 5. Plur. --s, Lucr. 856.
2) a drop: --s of blood, Mcb. II, 1, 46 (Gouts is also the term applied to the little knob-like swellings or indurated drops which appear at times on the legs and feet of the hawk. Edinb. Rev. Oct. 72).
